purpose: Decide what H-A2.13 permits after the lower-resolution proxy result, without treating SPY 1-minute bars as the hypothesis itself.
research_question: Does the directionally coherent H-A2.13 proxy evidence justify a separate narrowly scoped exact-data plan, or should H-A2 be narrowed further before any data-source work?

evidence_review.proxy_conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้

data_resolution_logic.hypothesis_first_rule: H-A2 is a macro/VIX-conditioned ORB hypothesis. SPY 1-minute bars are only one method for testing exact ORB timing and fill-path claims.
one_minute_bars_not_required_for: deciding whether a narrow source plan is worth drafting
data_resolution_logic.minimum_next_question: Can an exact 2022-10 stress rerun falsify or strengthen the H-A2 mechanism under the same non-risk/risk split observed in H-A2.13?

decision_rationale: The lower-resolution proxy and existing exact-quote trade outcomes both show risk-labeled macro/VIX days underperforming non-risk days.
The result is still E1 only and cannot validate edge, but it is stronger than a blind data chase because the next exact-data question is now named.
Because the current evidence does not test exact 2022-10 ORB entries/exits, the next artifact should be a narrow exact-data plan, not an immediate provider request.
A valid next plan must state why exact 1-minute bars are necessary for the exact stress rerun and must preserve the no-paper-trading and no-edge-claim gates.

selected_next_path.allowed_next_artifact: A separate H-A2 exact 2022 underlying-bar acquisition/import plan or preregistration.
allowed_scope: 2022-10 SPY underlying bars needed to use already-downloaded 2022-10 option quotes
cost/approval gate if a new provider or paid source is proposed
selected_next_path.allowed_claim: H-A2 remains worth a narrowly scoped exact-data plan.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB has been tested.
Do not approve paper trading or operational validation.
Do not approve IBKR historical-bar requests from this decision alone.
Do not approve paid data or a new provider from this decision alone.

rejected_paths.reason: H-A2.13 justifies planning, not execution. IBKR remains externally blocked unless local TWS/Gateway is listening and a separate data-only probe plan passes.
Any new provider or paid source requires explicit user approval and cost/source policy. Current headroom is only 5.010294 USD.
The proxy evidence is directionally coherent enough to justify a narrow exact-data plan before narrowing the hypothesis further.
No strategy hypothesis has E2 acceptance; H-A2.13 and this decision are not acceptance-grade evidence.
